content:
- **Major — `PatchApplyResult` over-reports changes on no-op saves**  
  **Location:** `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/configEditor/patch.ts:5-7`, `:53-59`, `:83-99`, `:103-127`, `:140-142`, `:180-197`, `:215-223`  
  **Fix:** Only mark `routerConfigChanged` / `budgetChanged` / `localOverridesChanged` when the serialized document actually changes. Add a helper like `setIfChanged()` that compares `doc.getIn(path)` with the incoming scalar before calling `setIn`, or snapshot `docContentHash()` before/after mutation and derive flags from actual diffs. This matters because the payload currently posts full section state, so the current implementation will report changes and trigger rewrites even when the user saved without editing anything.

- **Major — `threshold_usd` and `warn_at_percent` do not demote from local back to shared**  
  **Location:** `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/configEditor/patch.ts:109-112`, `:125-127`  
  **Fix:** In the `"shared"` branches, delete any existing local override so the selected source actually takes effect:
  ```ts
  deleteIfPresent(localOverridesDoc, ["threshold_usd"], result, "localOverridesChanged");
  deleteIfPresent(localOverridesDoc, ["warn_at_percent"], result, "localOverridesChanged");
  ```
  As written, saving either field with `source === "shared"` updates `budget.yaml` but leaves the old `local-overrides.yaml` value in place, so the local override still wins after merge.
